## Summary

Describe the change succinctly.

## Changes
- Describe the key changes here (features, bug fixes, refactors, docs, etc.).

## Risk Analysis
Summarize the risk here, or link a note under `.motherlode/records/change-risk/` for security-sensitive changes.

## How to Test
```bash
npm install
npm run lint
npm run typecheck
npm test
npm run build
npm run openssf:check
```

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] No raw PII logged
- [ ] Local-only defaults maintained
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or security posture changed
